hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Kay (K) is the knowledge base at ~/Documents/Knowledge.\nBefore creating any K entity, read ~/Documents/Knowledge/meta/ontology/{type}/readme.md first.\nBefore creating any K research or project, search QMD (vec) for similar existing ones using the proposed name. If score > 0.5, show the match and ask whether to contribute to the existing entity or create new with a differentiated title."}}'
